name: What if my warehouse injury claim gets denied by insurance?
description: Appeal fast with doctor notes; get a lawyer.[3]

mainEntity.name: What if my warehouse injury claim gets denied by insurance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast with doctor notes; get a lawyer.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within 20 days in Utah or per Idaho rules, providing new evidence like doctor opinions.** Denials often stem from 'not work-related' findings.[1][3] Key factors: hire a lawyer experienced in hearings; common for initial denials. Request file review; prepare for Industrial Commission hearing. Most overturned with strong medical proof.[3]
